  • ECUs

N_PB1D_TCU_V4.7

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7CA
Recv ID: 7DA
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 77
Func Name: DCM Renault

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "1",
    "supplier": "284",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0001"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "90",
    "supplier": "284",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0001"
  }
]
